title: Site Operations Specialist
highlights: Managed site experiences, content, promotions and analytics across the Bluestem Brands portfolio.
Translated UI designs into responsive pages using modern HTML, CSS and JQuery.

Implemented A/B testing and multivariate testing to optimize user experience and increase conversion rates. Conducted data analysis using Adobe Analytics and Looker Studio to track user behavior and site performance.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to develop and maintain site features, including product pages, search functionality and checkout processes.
Developed internal monitoring applications using Go and Playwright to monitor broken images, links and product pages.

title: Development Consultant
highlights: Developed custom Salesforce-based ERP systems with in-house software teams using TypeScript, SQL and Gitlab.
Collaborated with remote consulting teams to resolve client issues and provide technical solutions to business problems.

title: Software Engineer
highlights: Handled e-commerce operations, including user administration, third-party application integrations and internal business service development across the Proozy's Shopify Plus online portfolio.

Developed front-end solutions using Liquid, Vue.js and the Shopify GitHub CI/CD Integration. Increased site performance by 50% by implementing responsive images and applying JavaScript best practices.
Maintained API integrations for third-party vendors hosted on cloud infrastructure with Node.js, Docker and Amazon Web Services.
Implemented Google Tag Manager and Google Analytics to track user behavior and site performance.
Designed a custom inventory and order data tagging system to improve product planning, merchandising and warehouse efficiency with the TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL and the Shopify GraphQL API.

title: Freelance Developer
highlights: Support Shopify stores with app integration, theme customizations, data/intentory management
Designed custom applications, APIs and UIs with Google Apps Script and TailwindCSS.
Convert Google Sheets data into RESTful API endpoints.
Collected and transformed JSON data into spreadsheets tables for real time data tracking.

title: Mobile Expert
highlights: Managed sales and support for T-Mobile devices/services based on unique customer needs.
Collaborated with peers, management and specialty leaders across multiple stores to resolve billing issues, achieve sales goals and improve business processes.

title: Inside Sales Representative
highlights: Qualify leads for and strategize with outside Sales Professionals, making over 50 prospect calls per day to schools and districts across North America.
Complete follow-up outbound calls to schedule service presentations.

title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
highlights: Prepare and post photographer job advertisements through internal ATS and on external platforms, including sponsored social media campaigns.
Conducted phone interviews for qualified candidates and scheduled in-person interviews for studio managers across the US.

title: Lead Sale Consultant
highlights: Maintained knowledge of mobile and IoT technology and trends to close sales and achievement revenue goals.
Trained and coached Mobile/Connections with the Best Buy Mobile sales philosophy.
reasonForLeaving: Closure of Best Buy Mobile stores nationwide
